title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: AWS CDK tutorial demonstrating Infrastructure as Code principles by building a serverless REST API with DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway using Python. Contrasts manual AWS console setup with declarative infrastructure definitions in CDK.
